action_text: Open the filter condition field selector
rationale: To build the required filter, first select the field; opening the filter field dropdown lets us choose "Short description".
Enabling the per-column search row provides a quick way to filter the "Short description" column by the target string.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: The Short description column menu often includes filtering options; opening it may allow setting a "contains" filter directly.

action_text: Open the natural language filter input
rationale: Natural language filter can quickly create the condition "Short description contains '#SERIES-f9d328e8-a'" in one step.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the list search box
rationale: As an alternative approach, use the list's search box; after switching the field later, the entered term can filter results.
